# Ryno Tools

> Ryno Tools is a free, offline-capable microlearning platform for certification exam prep.
> Last updated: 2026-06-07. No login, no paywall — all content is freely accessible.
> Study ham radio (Technician, General, Extra class), falconry apprentice licensing,
> and CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 through adaptive flashcard quizzes and timed exam simulations.
> No login required. Works offline as a Progressive Web App.

## Quizzes Available

- [Ham Radio Technician](https://ryno.tools/): 425+ FCC Technician license practice questions covering regulations, operating procedures, and electronics fundamentals.
- [Ham Radio General](https://ryno.tools/): 456+ FCC General class questions on HF propagation, advanced operating, and regulations.
- [Ham Radio Extra](https://ryno.tools/): 706+ FCC Amateur Extra questions — the most advanced amateur radio license.
- [Falconry Apprentice](https://ryno.tools/): 398+ questions on raptor biology, health, housing, federal/state regulations, and hunting ethics.
- [CompTIA Security+ SY0-701](https://ryno.tools/): 100 practice questions for the CompTIA Security+ certification.

## Features

- Tag-based question filtering
- Timed exam mode with pass/fail scoring
- Instant feedback with explanations
- Light/dark mode
- Installable as a PWA (works offline)

## Articles

<!-- blog-articles:start -->
- [Falconry Mews & Housing Standards Every Apprentice Must Know](https://ryno.tools/blog/falconry-mews-housing-standards/) — A mews is more than a shed with a bird in it. Falconry housing standards are federally regulated and heavily tested on the apprentice exam. Here's what you need to know.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-08
  track: falconry/apprentice
  tags: Equipment, Rules and Regulations, Health
- [Ohm's Law Made Simple for the Ham Radio Technician Exam](https://ryno.tools/blog/ohms-law-technician-exam/) — Ohm's Law — V = IR — appears on every Technician license exam. Master the formula, the units, and the common exam scenarios in one focused read.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-08
  track: ham-radio/technician
  tags: voltage, resistance, current, power
- [Symmetric vs. Asymmetric Encryption: A Security+ SY0-701 Primer](https://ryno.tools/blog/symmetric-vs-asymmetric-encryption/) — Symmetric encryption uses one key; asymmetric uses two. That distinction drives dozens of Security+ SY0-701 exam questions on TLS, key exchange, digital signatures, and PKI.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-08
  track: cybersecurity/sy0-701
  tags: cryptography, network security
- [Can You Take the Ham Radio Exam Online in 2026?](https://ryno.tools/blog/ham-radio-exam-online-2026/) — Remote ham radio exams have been available since 2020 and are now a mainstream option. Here is everything you need to know to take your Technician exam online.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-07
  track: ham-radio/technician
  tags: exam-prep, online-exam, technician, ve-session
- [How Hard Is the Ham Radio Technician Exam?](https://ryno.tools/blog/how-hard-is-ham-radio-technician-exam/) — Most people pass the ham radio Technician exam on their first try with 10–20 hours of study. Learn the question count, passing score, topic breakdown, and best study methods.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-07
  track: ham-radio/technician
  tags: exam-prep, technician, study-tips, fcc
- [How Many Questions Are on the Falconry Apprentice Exam?](https://ryno.tools/blog/how-many-questions-falconry-apprentice-exam/) — The falconry apprentice exam is typically 100 questions and requires an 80% score to pass. Here is what the test covers, how scoring works, and how to register through your state wildlife agency.
  author: Ask Ryno
  published: 2026-06-07
  track: falconry/apprentice
  tags: exam-prep, apprentice, falconry-license, regulations
